R

RadixSorter<E> - Class in edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.sorter
RadixSorter uses the radix sort algorithm to sort data

Test cases for RadixSorter
RadixSorterTest() - Constructor for class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.sorter.RadixSorterTest
 
RANDOM_ELEMENT_SELECTOR - Static variable in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.sorter.QuickSorter
Pivot selection strategy that uses the element at a randomly-chosen index each time a pivot must be selected
RandomElementSelector() - Constructor for class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.sorter.QuickSorter.RandomElementSelector
 
readInputAsArray(String) - Static method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.io.StudentReader
Returns the input CSV file as an array of Student objects
remove(int) - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.list.ArrayBasedList
The code for this method is based on the mergesort algorithm on page 260 in the course textbook "Data Structures and Algorithms" by Goodrich, Tamassia, Goldwasser.
remove(int) - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.list.List
Removes and returns the element at the specified index of the list
remove(int) - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.list.SinglyLinkedList
Removes and returns the element at the specified index of the list
remove(Position<E>) - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.list.positional.PositionalLinkedList
removes the element at the given position and returns it after it is removed The code for this method is based on the mergesort algorithm on page 279 in the course textbook "Data Structures and Algorithms" by Goodrich, Tamassia, Goldwasser.
remove(Position<E>) - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.list.positional.PositionalList
Removes the position p from the list and returns the element stored at p.
removeFirst() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.list.AbstractList
removes the first element in the list
removeFirst() - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.list.List
Removes and returns the element at the front of the list (index 0)
removeLast() - Method in class edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.list.AbstractList
removes the last element in the list
removeLast() - Method in interface edu.ncsu.csc316.dsa.list.List
Removes and returns the element at the end of the list (index n)
